summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Harbor Disciplined Bond ETF (AGGS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed, investing in a diversified portfolio of US dollar-denominated fixed income securities with varying maturities and credit quality. The fund aims for total return AGGS was launched on Apr 30, 2024 and is issued by Harbor.
